# audit.sql.d

```ts
export declare const INSERT = "\nINSERT INTO audit_logs (user_id, data_source_id, action, sql_text, result_summary, ip_address)\nVALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)";
export declare const LIST = "\nSELECT al.*, u.username\nFROM audit_logs al\nLEFT JOIN users u ON al.user_id = u.id\nWHERE 1=1";
```
